title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cisco India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cisco India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cisco India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cisco India:
Cisco India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India!
